feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Number Ranges for PO number for Sales order number for respective countries
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

The user requriment is as follows

what is the sequence number for PO number for Sales order number for respective countries?

Where can i find this information. We are in ECC 6.0

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Sales rebates - condition contract
entry.content:
Dear experts , 

Our customer requirement for sales rebates is to set in a condition contract for each customer for several material groups . 

For example : 

business volume is calculated by Liter (L) : for Target for Group 1 = 10.000 L  and Target for Group 2 = 20.000 L

Material groupRealised TargetRebate 
Group 1>80% (8.000 L)2.5% of sales revenue realised on group 1
>100%(10.000 L)4.5% of sales revenue realised on group 1
Group 2>80% (16.000 L)2.5%of sales revenue realised on group 2
>100% (20.000 L)5% of sales revenue realised on group 2

Could you please tell me what condition contract type to use in order to calculate business volume and how to calculate sales rebate based on sales revenue by material group ?

 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: ATP not running for sales orders coming in through EDI
entry.content:
Hi,

For orders coming in over EDI it seems that the ATP check is running completely. We get a delivery date on the sales order line, but when we try to create the outbound delivery this is not possible. The error message says the "0 PC of material XXX available", even if we have the setting to be able to create outbounds without stock. If we rerun the ATP check it is then possible to create the outbound, but then the delivery dates will be wrong (as this is most often not discovered the same day as the order is created, but later in the process).

Could there be a setting in the ATP parameters missing or what could be the issue?

Kind Regards,

Cecilia

entry.title: How to create the Credit Management (SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2408)
entry.content:
How to create the Advance Credit Management for S4hana Public Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Sending Customer invoice to Multiple recipients in S/4 Hana with BRF+
entry.content:
Hi,

we have maintained Multiple E-Mails in Business partner and the requirement is to send Invoice to all E-Mails once the Invoice is saved.

Presently system sending Invoice Output only to one E-Mail address as per the SAP standard.

Please suggest how we can achieve this as we are using BRF+ OPD settings

Thank you

entry.title: What to do when there are no free intervals found in xdn1 explain in detail ?
Issue with Creating an Situation Type for Outbound Delivery Notifications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Is it possible to add an event object for outbound delivery in the ABAP Class event category, or should I stick to the existing event object for outbound deliveries under the BOR Object Type?

I’m currently working with SAP S/4HANA Cloud and facing a challenge while trying to create an extended situation type to send notifications when an outbound delivery is updated.

In the process of event creation under the situation object, I used the Situation Object app to create a situation object for outbound deliveries. However, I noticed that in the ABAP Class event category, there is only an event object for inbound deliveries (CL_LE_SHP_WF_EVENT_INBDLV).

Later, I found an event object for outbound deliveries, but it was under the BOR Object Type event category. I used this to create the situation object, but unfortunately, it didn't work as expected.

Any guidance or suggestions on how to approach this would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Condition not considered (Requirement 0000055 not fulfilled) getting this error for non-valuated
entry.content: Getting the above error for non-valuated material in sale order for other material it is working fine, can anyone help me out

entry.title: Item category CBXL
entry.content:
How do I assign the item category CBXL to the Sales document type OR/Item category group CBOR?

I need to be able to create orders with bought-in items that are FOC, but without adding a price and without needing to create an invoice.

Kind Regards,

Cecilia

entry.title: MM01 sales org view not coming in 2023 version
entry.content:
Hello All,

In MM01 by taking select view in that i'm not able find sales organisation in sap 2023 version.

where as in 2022 version it's showing.

Experts please help me on this issue.

entry.title: INVOIC02 iDod with Down Payment and BillingPlan
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we are integrating SAP SD Billing with Peppol Network/ eInvoice 3.0. Therefore we are using INVOIC02 iDoc as basis. We have Business cases with downpayment/ billingplan and final invoices. Infact the final invoice has serious issues in integration as the 'amouts payed' is designed as separate billing item which "understands" the eInvoice Standard as own item. Besides of that eInvoice wants to have the "amounts payed" on header level which is not compatible to the billg plan design is SAP with AZWR conditiontype. 

Any ideas? Is there an extension/ functionmodue available to implement this changes in iDOc or a different messagetype?

 

Regards

Andreas

entry.title: INVOIC02 iDod with Down Payment and BillingPlan
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we are integrating SAP SD Billing with Peppol Network/ eInvoice 3.0. Therefore we are using INVOIC02 iDoc as basis. We have Business cases with downpayment/ billingplan and final invoices. Infact the final invoice has serious issues in integration as the 'amouts payed' is designed as separate billing item which "understands" the eInvoice Standard as own item. Besides of that eInvoice wants to have the "amounts payed" on header level which is not compatible to the billg plan design is SAP with AZWR conditiontype. 

Any ideas? Is there an extension/ functionmodue available to implement this changes in iDOc or a different messagetype?

 

Regards

Andreas

entry.title: Partner function in equipment.
entry.content:
In SAP Public cloud, we have configured new partner function (Install At), the same getting determined in customer master and sales order. While creating delivery and doing PGI, we link serial number to the material (Extras - Serial Numbers - assign the respective serial number).
Need help with the requirement is to have this partner function populated in the partner function for the equipment and should be visible in IE03.

entry.title: Settlement management - incorrect cancellation of accruals
entry.content:
I have Settlement Management set up with settings very close to standard and I have the following issue. 

There are 3 settlement dates: 1 - Delta accrual, 2 - Delta accrual, 3 - Partial settlement (and this goes on as accruals are posted every month and partial settlement every quarter). 
1  posts the accrual OK, 252 USD - correct - both RES1 and RED1 condition populated, but only RES1 active
2 cancels 1, then post, 630 USD - correct - - both RES1 and RED1 condition populated, but only RES1 active. REA2 is there as cancellation with -252 (correct)
3 (partial settlement) cancels both 1 and 2 with REA2 -882 which should only be -630, then posts full quarter amount (correctly). Here, accrual 1 should not be cancelled again, only accrual 2. 
How can this be fixed?

entry.title: RV_SALES_DOCUMENT_VIEW_3 - Customer selection not working
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm facing an issue with function module RV_SALES_DOCUMENT_VIEW_3 when trying to obtain open sales orders, similar to transaction VA05.

Adding either material or sales order values in VBCOM provides the necessary filtered output. 
However, the filtering doesn't seem to be working by customer number (KUNNR).

Do you have any insights on how this issue can be overcome? I want to filter out open sales orders at a CUSTOMER LEVEL.
Any suggestions welcome.

Best Regards,
Samith

entry.title: Solution for proof batch delivery for outbound delivery
entry.content:
Dear Sir

Case:


The customer requests that the expense and Revenue must be in the same month according to the standard work cycle of the sap that is being worked on now, a sales order is created for a quantity of 100 pieces, and then an invoice is created for 100 pieces, then delivery is created for 100 pieces, and then PGI OBD for 100 pieces, but the Stock are still already in the Storage location and 100 pieces are sent in separate batches according to the needs of the Sold-to-party request to different Ship-to-Party forwarders.


business needs


We need a solution that confirms and tracks and prints the delivery of batches to different Ship-to-Party forwarders and each batch has a different freight order according to the location of the Ship-to-Party to which it will be shipped.
And the ability to track the quantities that have been delivered and the remaining quantities that have not been delivered for the same delivery.

Thanks

entry.title: Solution for proof batch delivery for outbound delivery
entry.content:
Dear Sir

Case:

The customer requests that the expense and Revenue must be in the same month according to the standard work cycle of the sap that is being worked on now, a sales order is created for a quantity of 100 pieces, and then an invoice is created for 100 pieces, then delivery is created for 100 pieces, and then PGI OBD for 100 pieces, but the Stock are still already in the Storage location and 100 pieces are sent in separate batches according to the needs of the Sold-to-party request to different Ship-to-Party forwarders.

business needs

We need a solution that confirms and tracks and prints the delivery of batches to different Ship-to-Party forwarders and each batch has a different freight order according to the location of the Ship-to-Party to which it will be shipped.
And the ability to track the quantities that have been delivered and the remaining quantities that have not been delivered for the same delivery.

Thanks

entry.title: Sending Customer invoice from multiple E-mail Addresses of Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to send Customer Invoice  to multiple E-mail Addresses maintained in  business Partner.

My client is on S/4 Hana On-Premise, looking for Standard Solution on BRF+ and not customized.

Please advice.

Regards

Siva

entry.title: SAP SD
entry.content: how to get those particular Delivery Nos for Intercompany STO, against which 641 Movement has been completed but 101 MIGO not yet posted?

entry.title: ATP Check with Batch Determination
entry.content:
Hi All

SAP S/4 HANA native ATP ( Advance ATP is not in scope ) determines the ATP check based on the actual availability of open stocks and expected future receipts. However, the issue is when a customer has specific dating requirements.

SAP S/4 HANA does not allow for ATP check in sales order across batches. Hence, in the sales order, if batch is ignored. the system may confirm the sales orders based on stocks across all the batches. However, since the delivery should only see the items that relevant based on batch determination condition records, we now have a situation where a sales order would be confirmed ( with a confirmation to the customer ), but the delivery would be partially proceed in the system based on allowed batches.

This leads to a customer dissatisfaction. Would appreciate inputs from fellow members on how this can be managed. 

Regards

Rohit Zalani
